title: ampacus glabra
intro: Ampacus glabra, also known as the smooth ampacus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues and inflammation. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating cough and sore throat. Herbal preparations of Ampacus glabra include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
